name: Parallax42 Compliance Intelligence Agent
description: A chat-first, evidence-backed compliance council that builds reviewer-ready cases, maps obligations, retrieves evidence, names gaps, and packages a deterministic human-review decision.

models.llm: gpt-5.1 via Compass-compatible API or Parallax42 Compass gateway
models.embeddings: text-embedding-3-large via Compass-compatible API or Parallax42 Compass gateway

agents.name: Compliance Orchestrator
agents.role: Scopes the case and decides which compliance domains apply.

agents.name: Regulatory Obligation Mapper
agents.role: Maps the request to policy, privacy, AI, continuity, technical, finance, and third-party obligations.

agents.name: Evidence Examiner
agents.role: Reviews supplied evidence, citations, retrieval matches, and missing proof.

agents.name: Risk And Control Analyst
agents.role: Turns obligations and evidence gaps into controls, blockers, owners, and remediation actions.

agents.name: Responsible AI Reviewer
agents.role: Checks unsupported certainty, automation boundaries, bias-sensitive assumptions, and human approval requirements.

agents.name: Audit Packager
agents.role: Packages the final decision, trace, evidence IDs, gaps, and reviewer actions.

capabilities: advisory-only Compass/CrewAI specialist outputs when configured
notes: The deterministic compliance engine remains final decision owner.
Live LLM and CrewAI outputs are advisory and never auto-approve.
RBAC enforcement is intentionally deferred; public demo mode uses audit-mode auth.
